nasb.text: For their grain offering, you shall offer fine flour mixed with oil: three-tenths of an ephah for a bull and two-tenths for the ram.

esv.text: also their grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil; three tenths of an ephah shall you offer for a bull, and two tenths for a ram;

cnv.text: 同獻的素祭，是用油調和的細麵，為每頭公牛犢要獻三公斤；為每隻公綿羊要獻兩公斤；

ccb.text: 同时要献上调了油的细面粉作素祭，每头公牛需献三公斤素祭，每只公绵羊需献两公斤素祭，
